title: cleome bojeri
intro: Cleome bojeri, also known as the Cleome or Spider Flower, is an annual or biennial flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleome bojeri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Cleome bojeri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
